candidate_llm_application: LLM long-horizon reasoning via non-specific iterative degradation of hard problems: extracellular 'enzyme' analog = test-time tool use producing intermediate hypotheses over many steps.

results.title: Test-Time Compute Scaling: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on test-time compute scaling, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
results.judge_justification: Both candidate and result operate on the same LLM artefact (test-time compute scaling); functional outcome matches even though vocabulary differs (specific-mycology terms vs LLM terms).
